A.label: Scenario A — During War
A.description: Trust capitalised from assets available during active conflict: ERA loan proceeds, EU Facility, bilateral donors, diaspora bonds. Frozen principal remains in custodian accounts pending legal resolution.

B.label: Scenario B — Post-War
B.description: Trust capitalised from full reparations settlement, frozen asset transfer, and post-war reconstruction pledges. Higher corpus but longer mobilisation timeline.
